title: Dani Portfolio site config
description: Curation layer driving the live portfolio. Every videoId here must exist in data/library.json. Edited via the visual editor (editor.html), consumed by the front-end and by scripts/sync_from_sheet.py.

version.description: Schema version. Bump when introducing breaking changes.

generated_at.description: ISO timestamp of the last edit. Set by the editor; cosmetic.

featured.description: Hero carousel groups, in display order. Each group is one long-form video paired with the short-form videos derived from it. Recommended length 2-3 to avoid overwhelming the viewer.

long_form_id.description: videoId of the long-form anchor for this featured group.

short_form_ids.description: videoIds of the short-form pieces derived from the long-form, in display order.

sections.description: Ordered list of category sections rendered below the featured carousel. Each section gets an anchor in the top nav for smooth-scroll.

id.description: Slug used for the URL anchor (e.g. #long-form) and CSS hooks.

title.description: Display name shown in the nav and the section header.

video_ids.description: videoIds in display order. Must exist in library.json.
